reasoning: Target stores releaseYear as YYYY-MM-DD strings and criticScore/userScore as strings. Source metacritic and sales have numeric score types, so cast them to string. Dates in all sources are already date-like but should be formatted to match target style. Platform/developer mostly match target style; only safe whitespace cleanup is included. No ID columns were touched, and no aggressive case changes were applied because target preserves mixed case. genres_genre is list-like in the target schema.
